name: io.github.efranceschetti/festo-codesys-mcp
description: MCP server for Festo/CODESYS PLC engineering — generates IEC 61131-3 Structured Text and validated PLCopen XML, with an embedded knowledge base (27 topics, 19 manuals, BM25 search) and a 38-block ST library.

environment_variables.name: FESTO_MCP_CODESYS_PATH
environment_variables.description: Optional. Absolute path to CODESYS.exe — enables the 12 ide_* tools that drive a live CODESYS V3.5 instance (Windows only).

environment_variables.name: FESTO_MCP_CODESYS_PROFILE
environment_variables.description: Required when using the ide_* tools. CODESYS profile name exactly as shown in the CODESYS version selector.

environment_variables.name: FESTO_MCP_PYTHON
environment_variables.description: Optional. Python interpreter for the XSD/semantic validators and hardware tools (needs lxml; hardware also needs festo-cpx-io / festo-edcon).

environment_variables.name: FESTO_MCP_ENABLE_HARDWARE
environment_variables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to enable the cpx_*/edcon_* hardware commissioning tools (bench use only — they write directly to Festo devices).

environment_variables.name: FESTO_MCP_ALLOW_OUTSIDE_WORKSPACE
environment_variables.description: Optional. Set to 1 to allow file-writing tools to write outside the workspace directory (disabled by default).
